title: Peek-a-Boo, Thandi!
synopsis: Baby Thandi loves playing peek-a-boo with her family members throughout her home. Each page reveals a different family member hiding behind colorful objects, creating a delightful repetitive pattern that teaches object permanence while celebrating family bonds.

illustration.description: Baby Thandi with dark curly hair and bright brown eyes sits on a soft cream-colored rug, clapping her tiny hands with delight. Behind a vibrant yellow curtain, we can see hints of her mama's colorful headwrap. The room has warm peach walls and gentle sunlight streaming through windows.
illustration.alt: Baby Thandi clapping while Mama hides behind yellow curtains

illustration.description: A smiling woman with beautiful dark skin and a bright yellow and orange headwrap peeks out from behind the curtain with sparkling eyes and a wide grin. Baby Thandi squeals with joy, her arms reaching up toward mama. Soft watercolor pastels create a cozy, loving atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Mama appearing from behind curtains as baby Thandi reaches up happily

illustration.description: Thandi crawls on soft hands and knees toward a large turquoise armchair. Behind the chair, we can glimpse papa's brown hand and part of his checkered shirt sleeve. The living room has warm terra cotta walls and a patterned rug with gentle geometric designs.
illustration.alt: Baby Thandi crawling toward armchair where Papa is hiding

illustration.description: A tall man with warm brown skin and a gentle beard emerges from behind the chair, his arms spread wide with joy. He wears a soft blue and white checkered shirt. Baby Thandi claps excitedly, her face beaming with pure happiness and recognition.
illustration.alt: Papa emerging from behind chair with arms spread as Thandi claps

illustration.description: Thandi looks curiously at a tall potted plant with large green leaves. Behind the plant, we can see her older brother's sneakers and the hem of his red shorts. The corner of the room has soft lavender walls and wooden toys scattered on a woven mat.
illustration.alt: Baby Thandi looking at plant where big brother Dada is hiding

illustration.description: A smiling boy about four years old with short curly hair and the same warm brown skin as Thandi jumps out from behind the plant. He wears a bright red t-shirt and denim shorts, his face full of mischief and love. Thandi bounces excitedly on her bottom.
illustration.alt: Big brother Dada jumping out from behind plant as Thandi bounces

illustration.description: Baby Thandi sits near a cozy kitchen doorway, looking toward colorful pots and pans hanging on hooks. Behind the largest copper pot, we can see grandmother's floral apron and her gentle hands. The kitchen glows with warm golden light and has herbs growing on the windowsill.
illustration.alt: Baby Thandi looking toward kitchen where Gogo hides behind pots

illustration.description: A kind grandmother with silver-gray hair wrapped in a beautiful purple headwrap appears from behind the copper pot, flour dusting her warm brown hands and floral apron. Her eyes twinkle with wisdom and love. Baby Thandi wiggles her whole body with pure joy.
illustration.alt: Grandmother Gogo appearing from kitchen as baby Thandi wiggles happily

pages.text: Now we all say BOO! Love, love, love!

illustration.description: All family members surround baby Thandi in a gentle circle on the living room rug - Mama in her bright headwrap, Papa in his checkered shirt, brother Dada in his red shirt, and Gogo in her floral apron. Everyone has their hands up saying 'boo' together while Thandi claps in the center, surrounded by overwhelming love and joy.
illustration.alt: Whole family surrounding baby Thandi saying boo together with love

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: Who wears a beautiful headwrap?
questions.explanation: Mama wears a bright yellow and orange headwrap!

questions.question: Where does Gogo hide?
questions.explanation: Gogo hides behind the copper pot in the kitchen!

questions.question: What does baby Thandi do when family says boo?
questions.explanation: Thandi claps, giggles, bounces, and wiggles with joy!
